title: hulsea nana
intro: Hulsea nana, also known as Dwarf Marigold, is a small, annual plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The medicinal properties of Hulsea nana include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory infections. Hulsea nana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
